title: Business Analyst with experience in Accounting

summary.lv: Midis meklē biznesa analītiķi ar grāmatvedības pieredzi, kas palīdzēs klientiem maksimāli izmantot savas grāmatvedības un ERP sistēmas. Vajadzīga vismaz 2 gadu pieredze grāmatvedībā, tostarp gada pārskatu un bilanču sagatavošanā.
summary.en: Midis is hiring a Business Analyst with accounting experience to help clients get the most out of their accounting and ERP systems. Requires at least 2 years of accounting experience, including preparing annual reports and balance sheets.
